title: Configure payment webhook calls to Zapier endpoint

requirements.text: In the backend (main.mo), configure all outgoing payment notification/webhook HTTP outcalls to POST payment data to the Zapier webhook URL: https://hooks.zapier.com/hooks/catch/26632326/u0i6cx6/. This should fire whenever a payment event occurs (order payment, deposit, Stripe checkout completion, payout, or fee collection).
acceptanceCriteria: Payment events (checkout, deposit, payout, fee) trigger an HTTP POST to https://hooks.zapier.com/hooks/catch/26632326/u0i6cx6/
The POST body includes relevant payment details (amount, type, user, timestamp) in JSON format
The Zapier webhook URL is stored as a configurable constant in main.mo
Failed webhook calls do not block the primary payment transaction from completing

requirements.text: In the admin payments panel (frontend/src/components/admin/payments/PaymentsPanel.tsx and related payment components), display the configured Zapier webhook URL so admins can verify it is set correctly. Add a read-only field or info badge showing the active payment webhook endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin payment panel shows the active Zapier webhook URL: https://hooks.zapier.com/hooks/catch/26632326/u0i6cx6/
The field is read-only and clearly labeled as 'Payment Webhook Endpoint'
The display is visible within the Payments tab of the Admin Center

requirements.text: Fix the Admin Center access control so that the authenticated owner/admin user is recognized and granted admin access, resolving the 'Admin Access Required' lock screen shown in the screenshot. Ensure the access control initialization on page load correctly identifies the admin principal.
acceptanceCriteria: The authenticated admin user can access the Admin Center without seeing the lock screen
Non-admin users still see the 'Admin Access Required' lock screen
Access control state is correctly initialized when AdminCenterPage mounts

constraints: The Zapier webhook URL must be exactly: https://hooks.zapier.com/hooks/catch/26632326/u0i6cx6/
Webhook calls must use the existing HTTP outcalls mechanism in main.mo
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any paths under frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Replacing Stripe as the payment processor
Building a new webhook management UI with create/delete functionality
Adding real-time webhook delivery status tracking
